items.name: Easy Seat Right Side
items.description: criss cross seat with feet as far past knees as possible.

items.name: Easy Seat Left Side
items.description: Use blocks to rest forehead in gentle forward bend

items.name: Fire Log Right
items.description: From easy seat place ankle on knee.

items.name: Cobblers Look Right
items.description: Using blocks adjust so left ear rests on looks blocks

items.name: Cobblers Look Left
items.description: place right ear on blocks, look left.

items.name: Wide Leg Forward Fold Right
items.description: With Legs apart place right elbow on inside of knee, twist and reach left arm overhead toward toes

items.name: Wide leg forward fold center
items.description: with legs apart bend forward reach hands toward toes

poses.name: Half Splits
poses.description: Right leg forward, left leg bent.  Rock forward and back

poses.name: Splits, right leg forward
poses.description: Enter splits with right leg forward, option to use block for stability.

poses.name: Half Splits, left leg
poses.description: Right leg forward, left leg bent.  Rock forward and back

poses.name: Three legged dog
poses.description: from down dog lift right leg (option to bind right arm). raise and lift leg 10 times.

poses.name: Pigeon Right Leg
poses.description: From three legged dog enter to active pigeon.

poses.name: active pigeon, left arm
poses.description: reach for the extended leg's foot with left hand

poses.name: active pigeon, right arm
poses.description: reach for the extended leg's foot with right hand

poses.name: resting pigeon
poses.description: lay forward on either blocks or elbows for a resting pigeon.

poses.name: 3 legged dog, left leg
poses.description: sweep folded leg back and up, peddle out your dog and then lift left leg.  same options, lift 10 times.

poses.name: active pigeon, left leg
poses.description: From 3 legged dog sweep into an active pigeon.

poses.name: Pigeon, right arm
poses.description: Reach for the extended leg's foot with right hand

poses.name: Pigeon, left arm
poses.description: Reach for the extended leg's foot with left hand

poses.name: Resting Pigeon
poses.description: Lay forward on either blocks or elbows for a resting pigeon.

poses.name: Return to Dog
poses.description: Sweep folded leg back and up, peddle out your dog.

items.name: Bow (inside)
items.description: Grab feet on the inside of sole.

items.name: Locust
items.description: clasp hands behind back and lift chest and legs.

items.name: Thread needle right arm
items.description: Raise right arm and thread needle

items.name: Thread needle left arm
items.description: unwind right arm and do other side.

items.name: Wrists
items.description: From Table Top lift finger tips.

items.name: Lion's pose
items.description: extend tongue and take deep breathes.
